events.title: The week of tissues
events.text: A stubborn seasonal bug arrives with a sore throat, heavy limbs, and terrible timing.

choices.label: Rest properly
choices.outcome: The world waits while your body does the work of recovering.

choices.label: Get medical advice
choices.outcome: A check confirms it is ordinary and gives you a sensible recovery plan.

choices.label: Carry on as usual
choices.outcome: The week gets done, but the illness lingers longer than it needed to.

events.title: A forgotten refund
events.text: An old account closes with a refund you had completely forgotten was coming.

choices.label: Put it aside
choices.outcome: The money becomes a little more breathing room.

choices.label: Spend some on a memorable day
choices.outcome: The refund turns into laughter, food, and a story worth keeping.

choices.label: Share it with someone close
choices.outcome: The surprise becomes twice as enjoyable.

events.title: Guaranteed returns
events.text: A confident stranger presents an investment that is urgent, exclusive, and apparently unable to fail.

choices.label: Research it first
choices.outcome: Two searches reveal warnings, vanished websites, and a regulator notice.

variants.outcome: Against the odds, an early payout arrives before the scheme disappears.
The contact vanishes, taking your money and their polished promises.

choices.label: Walk away
choices.outcome: The stranger quickly finds someone else to pressure.

events.title: A drip becomes a stream
events.text: A quiet household leak chooses the middle of the night to become an urgent repair.

choices.label: Call an emergency professional
choices.outcome: The repair is expensive, dry, and blessedly complete.

choices.label: Study a guide and fix it

variants.outcome: Several careful hours later, the pipe holds and your confidence rises.
The first repair creates a second leak. Eventually, a professional solves both.

choices.label: Use buckets until morning
choices.outcome: The buckets work, sleep does not.

events.title: The box at the back
events.text: While clearing a cupboard, you find an old hobby packed away with half-finished ideas.

choices.label: Make space for it again
choices.outcome: Your hands remember more than you expected.

choices.label: Give the supplies away
choices.outcome: Someone else lights up at exactly the right box of possibilities.

choices.label: Sell what still has value
choices.outcome: The cupboard gains space and your account gains a little cash.

events.title: A result worth noticing
events.text: A routine check highlights a health marker that is not dangerous yet, but could become so.

choices.label: Make sustainable changes
choices.outcome: The changes are small enough to keep and large enough to matter.

choices.label: Overhaul everything at once
choices.outcome: The strict plan works briefly before collapsing under its own weight.

choices.label: Deal with it another year
choices.outcome: Nothing feels different, which makes postponing easy.

events.title: A seat at the small table
events.text: A local group asks you to take on a modest leadership role with very real responsibilities.

choices.label: Serve for a term
choices.outcome: Progress is slow and practical, measured in repaired benches and better meetings.

choices.label: Help without leading
choices.outcome: You contribute where you can without owning the whole agenda.

choices.label: Protect your current commitments
choices.outcome: The group understands. A full life is already a form of responsibility.

events.title: Monday without an alarm
events.text: The first stretch of retirement feels less like a holiday and more like an entirely new kind of time.

choices.label: Build a gentle routine
choices.outcome: Walks, projects, and regular calls give the weeks a welcome shape.

choices.label: Keep the calendar open
choices.outcome: Unplanned days lead to several small adventures.

choices.label: Take occasional project work
choices.outcome: A little work keeps your skills sharp without owning your life.

events.title: Stories worth leaving
events.text: A younger relative asks about your early years and realizes how many stories exist only in memory.

choices.label: Begin a family memoir
choices.outcome: The first page unlocks another, and then another.

choices.label: Record relaxed conversations
choices.outcome: Laughter, pauses, and voices become part of the archive too.

choices.label: Keep some stories private
choices.outcome: Not every memory needs an audience to remain meaningful.
